channel.title: EDGAR Live Scanner
channel.description: High-signal SEC EDGAR filings — tender offers, going-private, activist stakes, spinoffs, delistings, busted deals.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · FCHS
item.scanner:headline: Acquired by Westin SPAC for $650M EV; close Q4 2026
item.description:
Acquired by Westin SPAC for $650M EV; close Q4 2026

First Choice Healthcare Solutions (FCHS) entered into a definitive merger agreement with SPAC Westin Acquisition Corp. (WSTN). The transaction implies a pro forma enterprise value of approximately $650 million. The combined company will be named Wellgevity 360 and is expected to trade on Nasdaq. Closing expected in Q4 2026, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.

About: First Choice Healthcare Solutions, Inc. focuses on healthcare business in the United States. The company operates care and wellness clinics, which focuses on providing life improvement services, such as anti-aging, weight management, hormone replacement, and pharmacy services. It also provides rehabilitative services, including physical therapy. First Choice Healthcare Solutions, Inc. is headquartered in Melbourne, Florida.

  • Counterparty: Westin Acquisition Corp.
  • Deal value: $650,000,000
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-07-22
  • Expected Close: Q4 2026
  • Next catalyst: Shareholder votes and SEC registration

Mkt cap $140K · EV $30.6M · Health Care / Health Care Providers and Services

item.title: 📤 Divestiture · SCLX
item.scanner:headline: Sells Vivasor preferred shares for $12M cash; payments through June 2027
item.description:
Sells Vivasor preferred shares for $12M cash; payments through June 2027

Scilex entered into a stock repurchase agreement to sell its previously acquired Series A-1 and A-2 preferred shares of Vivasor to Vivasor for $12M. Payments are in tranches: $1M on signing, $5M by Sep 30, 2026, $2M by Dec 31, 2026, $2M by Mar 31, 2027, and $2M by Jun 30, 2027. The CEO of Scilex also serves as CEO of Vivasor, making this a related-party transaction.

About: Scilex Holding Company focuses on acquiring, developing, and commercializing non-opioid pain management products for the treatment of acute and chronic pain. Its commercial products include ZTlido (lidocaine topical system) 1.8% (ZTlido), a prescription lidocaine topical product for the relief of neuropathic pain associated with postherpetic neuralgia (PHN), which is a form of post-shingles nerve pain; ELYXYB, a ready-to-use oral solution for the acute treatment of migraine with or without aura …

  • Counterparty: Vivasor Holding Company
  • Deal value: $11,999,762.28
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-07-18
  • Expected Close: June 30, 2027
  • Next catalyst: Next payment of $5M due by Sep 30, 2026

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · SLP
item.scanner:headline: Acquired by Altaris for $18.50 cash per share; vote Aug 27
item.description:
Acquired by Altaris for $18.50 cash per share; vote Aug 27

Entered into a definitive merger agreement to be acquired by affiliates of Altaris, LLC for $18.50 per share in cash, valuing the total transaction at approximately $375 million. The merger has been unanimously approved by the board and is subject to shareholder approval at a special meeting on August 27, 2026. The consideration represents a 26% premium to the 60-day volume-weighted average price.

About: Simulations Plus, Inc. develops drug discovery and development software for modeling and simulation, and prediction of molecular properties utilizing artificial intelligence and machine learning based technology worldwide. It operates through Software and Services segments. The company offers GastroPlus, which predicts absorption, biopharmaceutics, pharmacokinetics, and pharmacodynamics in humans and animals; and DDDPlus and MembranePlus simulation products.

  • Counterparty: Altaris, LLC
  • Offer price: $18.50
  • Deal value: $375,000,000
  • Premium: 26%
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-06-15
  • Next catalyst: Special meeting on August 27, 2026

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · AIRI
item.scanner:headline: Acquires Tenax Aerospace for 126.9M shares; current holders retain ~4%
item.description:
Acquires Tenax Aerospace for 126.9M shares; current holders retain ~4%

Will acquire Tenax Aerospace Acquisition, LLC via a merger, issuing 126,900,000 shares (25,380,000 post-split) to Tenax holders. Current AIRI stockholders will own approximately 4% of the combined company on a fully diluted basis, representing a change of control. The merger agreement was amended and restated as of July 2, 2026; a special meeting of AIRI stockholders is scheduled to vote on the stock issuance and related proposals.

About: Air Industries Group, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of precision components and assemblies for defense and aerospace industry in the United States. It offers actuators, arresting gears, aerostructures, aircraft structures, chaff pod assemblies, machining and milling solutions, cylinders, drag beams and braces, flight controls, flight safety components, integrated assemblies, landing gears, large diameter turn-mills, submarine valves, thrust struts, …

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · Greenbacker Renewable Energy Co
item.scanner:headline: Acquired by MN8 Energy for ~$1.71/sh cash+stock; earnout up to $0.12; close Q4 2026
item.description:
Acquired by MN8 Energy for ~$1.71/sh cash+stock; earnout up to $0.12; close Q4 2026

Entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by MN8 Energy Holdings LLC for approximately $350M equity value, or ~$1.71 per share, plus up to $25M in milestone payments ($0.12/sh). Consideration is a mix of cash and equity in the combined company; the transaction is expected to close in Q4 2026, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals. The combined entity would be the 3rd-largest U.S. renewable independent power producer with 6.2 GW of operating capacity across 33 states.

  • Counterparty: MN8 Energy Holdings LLC

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Unsolicited · PAG
item.scanner:headline: Receives $210/share unsolicited take-private bid from Penske Corp & Mitsui
item.description:
Receives $210/share unsolicited take-private bid from Penske Corp & Mitsui

Received an unsolicited, preliminary, non-binding proposal from Penske Corporation and Mitsui to acquire the remaining 27.4% of shares not already owned for $210 per share cash. The board formed a special committee of disinterested directors to review the proposal. The bidders currently beneficially own 72.6% of the company's outstanding common stock.

About: Penske Automotive Group, Inc., a diversified transportation services company, operates automotive and commercial truck dealerships in the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, Italy, Japan, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and internationally. It operates through four segments: Retail Automotive, Retail Commercial Truck, Other, and Non-Automotive Investments. The company operates franchise dealerships under franchise agreements with various automotive manufacturers and distributors.

  • Counterparty: Penske Corporation and Mitsui & Co., Ltd.
  • Offer price: 210
  • Stake: 72.6
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-07-22
  • Next catalyst: Special committee review; no further disclosure until appropriate

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · CYCN
item.scanner:headline: Acquires Korsana Biosciences for ~1.4735 shares per Korsana share; $380M pre-closing financing
item.description:
Acquires Korsana Biosciences for ~1.4735 shares per Korsana share; $380M pre-closing financing

Has entered into a definitive merger agreement to acquire Korsana Biosciences, Inc. Under the terms, each share of Korsana common stock will be exchanged for approximately 1.4735 shares of Cyclerion common stock, subject to adjustment based on Cyclerion's net cash at closing. In connection with the merger, Korsana raised approximately $380 million in a pre-closing financing. The merger is subject to shareholder approvals and other conditions.

About: Cyclerion Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, engages in the development of treatments for serious diseases serious diseases with novel sGC stimulators in both the central nervous system (CNS) and the periphery. The company is developing Olinciguat, an orally administered vascular soluble guanylate cyclase (sGC) stimulator, which is in Phase 2 clinical trial to treat cardiovascular diseases; and Praliciguat, a systemic sGC stimulator for the treatment of rare kidney disease.

  • Counterparty: Korsana Biosciences, Inc.
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-04-01
  • Next catalyst: Cyclerion shareholder meeting (date TBD)

Px $3.63 · Mkt cap $15.7M · EV $12.8M · Health Care / Biotechnology

item.title: 👀 Activist · BHR
item.scanner:headline: Faces Al Shams activist campaign; Blackwells backs self-management plan
item.description:
Faces Al Shams activist campaign; Blackwells backs self-management plan

Issued a press release and social media posts defending its plan to spin out management from Ashford Inc., become a self-managed REIT, and reconstitute the board with fully independent directors. The company highlighted support from Blackwells Capital and attacked shareholder Wafic Said / Al Shams Investments, who is opposing these steps. The company is soliciting proxies for its 2026 Annual Meeting.

About: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on the high-growth luxury hotel and resort sector. The Company targets high-performance luxury urban and resort properties, specializing in assets that generate revenue per available room (RevPAR) at least twice the U.S. national average. Its industry-leading portfolio features luxury properties across the United States and the U.S. territories in the Caribbean. Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc.

  • Counterparty: Al Shams Investments Limited
  • Next catalyst: 2026 Annual Meeting (date TBD)

item.scanner:headline: Acquired by Rice family/UM Partners in merger; 47.5% combined stake disclosed
item.description:
Acquired by Rice family/UM Partners in merger; 47.5% combined stake disclosed

Is being acquired by a group of controlling shareholders led by the Rice family and UM Partners in a merger agreement. The reporting persons filed an amended Schedule 13D disclosing their combined beneficial ownership of approximately 47.5% of the company's Class A Common Stock and Class V Common Stock as of July 15, 2026, based on shares outstanding per the merger agreement. The transaction is pending.

About: Utz Brands, Inc. manufactures branded salty snacks in the United States. The company provides a range of salty snack food products, such as potato chips, tortilla chips, pretzels, cheese snacks, pub and party mixes, pork skins, and ready-to-eat popcorn, as well as other snacks which include salsa and dips; and non-branded and non-salty snacks comprising partner brands, private label, and co-manufacturing products.

  • Counterparty: Rice family/UM Partners group
  • Stake: 47.5
  • Consideration: empty

item.scanner:headline: Acquires Copra for $175M cash+stock; earnout up to $100M
item.description:
Acquires Copra for $175M cash+stock; earnout up to $100M

Acquired Copra Inc. for $175M in closing consideration ($140M cash + 467,071 shares of COCO common stock) plus an earnout of $45M-$100M based on 2028 gross profit. Copra common stockholders received $76.04 cash + 0.4346 COCO shares per share; preferred stockholders received $108.61 cash per share. The merger closed on July 22, 2026.

About: The Vita Coco Company, Inc. develops, manufactures, markets, and distributes coconut water products under the Vita Coco brand name in the United States, Canada, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia Pacific. It offers coconut water, oil, and juice products; Vita Coco Treats, a plant-based dairy alternative; Vita Coco Pressed, Vita Coco Coconut Juice, and Farmers Organic; Vita Coco Coconut MLK; and PWR LIFT, a protein-infused fitness drink.

  • Next catalyst: Earnout based on 2028 gross profit; minimum $45M, maximum $100M

item.description:

NOVAGOLD entered definitive agreements to acquire Paulson's 40% interest in Donlin Gold, increasing ownership to 100%. Consideration is all-stock: current NG shareholders (including Paulson) will own ~65% of New NG, while Paulson receives ~35% (plus existing stake for ~40% economic interest). New NG will be a Delaware corporation; closing expected Q4 2026, subject to 66 2/3% shareholder vote, court, regulatory, and stock exchange approvals.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · NG
item.scanner:headline: Acquires Paulson's 40% stake in Donlin Gold; reincorporates as NovaGold Corp at 1:1
item.description:
Acquires Paulson's 40% stake in Donlin Gold; reincorporates as NovaGold Corp at 1:1

Enters definitive agreements to acquire Paulson Advisers' 40% ownership interest in Donlin Gold LLC in an all-share transaction. A new Delaware corporation, NovaGold Corporation, will acquire all NOVAGOLD shares in a 1:1 exchange, with Paulson contributing its Donlin Gold stake at a 10% discount to market value. NOVAGOLD shareholders will own ~65% of the combined entity, which will have an equity value of approximately $4.2 billion and 100% ownership of Donlin Gold. The transaction is expected to close in Q4 2026, subject to shareholder, court, and stock exchange approvals.

About: NovaGold Resources Inc. operates in the gold mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold mineral properties in the United States. The company’s principal asset owns 60% interest in the Donlin Gold project consisting of 493 mining claims covering an area of approximately 29,008 hectares located in the Kuskokwim and Mt. McKinley Recording Districts. The company was formerly known as NovaCan Mining Resources (1985) Limited and changed its name to NovaGold Resources Inc.

  • Expected Close: Q4 2026
  • Next catalyst: Shareholder vote

item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Settled · ONAR
item.scanner:headline: Settles $1.5M note lawsuit with Feinberg Trust; 18% interest, quarterly payments
item.description:
Settles $1.5M note lawsuit with Feinberg Trust; 18% interest, quarterly payments

Settled a breach-of-contract lawsuit with the Jeffrey L. Feinberg Personal Trust over a $1.5M promissory note. The settlement requires Onar to pay $1.5M principal plus 18% simple interest from March 18, 2024, with an initial $50,000 payment, $300,000 by August 30, 2026, and 14 quarterly installments of $75,000 through February 2030. The lawsuit will be dismissed and all parties release claims.

About: ONAR Holding Corporation operates as a marketing technology company and agency network in the United States. It operates through Advertising and Marketing Services and Healthcare Marketing segment. The Advertising and Marketing Services segment provides digital marketing, creative, data science, and technology services. The Healthcare Marketing segment offers healthcare marketing solutions, specializing in medical laboratory and genetic testing marketing.

  • Counterparty: Jeffrey L. Feinberg Personal Trust

  • Consideration: cash

item.scanner:headline: Sells AI and Data Platform Business to Progress for ~$400M cash
item.description:
Sells AI and Data Platform Business to Progress for ~$400M cash

Entered into a definitive Asset Purchase Agreement to sell substantially all assets of its AI and Data Platform Business to Progress Software Corporation for approximately $400 million in cash, subject to customary adjustments for cash acquired and indebtedness. The transaction was approved by majority stockholders via written consent, so no further stockholder vote is required. Domo will retain its net operating loss carryforwards and cash proceeds, and its board will evaluate alternatives for the use of proceeds, including potential acquisitions to utilize the NOLs. Closing is subject to HSR antitrust clearance and filing of an information statement; there is no financing condition. A termination fee of $13.5 million applies under certain circumstances.

About: Domo, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates a cloud-based modern AI and data products platform in North America, Western Europe, Australia, Japan, and India. Its platform digitally connects from the chief executive officer to the frontline employee with the data, systems, and people in an organization, gives access to real-time data and insights, as well as allowing them to put data to work to multiply impact on business. Domo, Inc.

  • Counterparty: Progress Software Corporation
  • Deal value: $400 million
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-07-22

item.scanner:headline: FDA approves Jideytro for ROS1+ NSCLC; ahead of PDUFA date
item.description:
FDA approves Jideytro for ROS1+ NSCLC; ahead of PDUFA date

GSK's Jideytro (zidesamtinib) received FDA approval for previously treated ROS1-positive non-small cell lung cancer, based on ARROS-1 trial showing 44% ORR and 69% 12-month DOR. Approval came ahead of the 18 Sep 2026 PDUFA target. Jideytro is part of the recently completed Nuvalent acquisition.

It operates through Commercial Operations and Total R&D segments.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · NG
item.scanner:headline: Acquired by New NovaGold in all-share deal; Paulson contributes Donlin stake
item.description:
Acquired by New NovaGold in all-share deal; Paulson contributes Donlin stake

NOVAGOLD will be acquired by New NovaGold (a newly formed Delaware corporation) via a plan of arrangement, with each NOVAGOLD share exchanged for one New NovaGold share. Simultaneously, Paulson contributes its 40% interest in Donlin Gold to New NovaGold in exchange for shares. Current NOVAGOLD shareholders (including Paulson) will own ~65% of New NovaGold, and Paulson will own ~35% on a fully diluted basis. The transaction is expected to close in Q4 2026, subject to shareholder, court, and regulatory approvals.

About: NovaGold Resources Inc. operates in the gold mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold mineral properties in the United States. The company’s principal asset owns 60% interest in the Donlin Gold project consisting of 493 mining claims covering an area of approximately 29,008 hectares located in the Kuskokwim and Mt. McKinley Recording Districts. The company was formerly known as NovaCan Mining Resources (1985) Limited and changed its name to NovaGold Resources Inc.

  • Counterparty: NovaGold Corporation (New NovaGold)
  • Consideration: stock

item.scanner:headline: Elliott-led bondholders propose R$50B debt restructuring; Braskem rejects dilution terms
item.description:
Elliott-led bondholders propose R$50B debt restructuring; Braskem rejects dilution terms

Bondholders including Elliott Management presented Braskem with two restructuring proposals: one involving DIP financing with potential debt-to-equity conversion that would dilute controlling shareholders below 10%, and another extending maturities with full asset collateral. Braskem rejected both as 'far from acceptable' but continues negotiations. A court granted a 60-day stay of enforcement actions to facilitate mediation.

About: Braskem S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture, sale, import, and export of chemicals, petrochemicals, and fuels in Brazil. The company supplies electricity and other inputs to second-generation producers; sells utilities, such as steam, water, compressed air and industrial gases; industrial services; and engages in the production, supply, and sale of electric energy and gas.

  • Counterparty: Elliott Management and other bondholders
  • Announced: 2026-07-20
  • Next catalyst: 60-day court stay expires; next proposal expected

item.description:
Resumes tender offer for 25% of Brava Energia; auction Aug 5

Ecopetrol's Brazilian subsidiary resumed the voluntary tender offer (OPAV) to acquire 116,110,717 common shares of Brava Energia S.A., representing approximately 25% of its share capital. The OPAV is open until August 5, 2026, when the auction will take place. The transaction is subject to regulatory approvals and conditions precedent.

About: Ecopetrol S.A. operates as an integrated energy company. It operates through four segments: Exploration and Production; Transport and Logistics; Refining and Petrochemicals; and Energy transmission and Toll Roads Concessions. The Exploration and Production segment engages in the exploration and production of oil and gas. The Transport and Logistics segment is involved in the transportation of crude oil, motor fuels, fuel oil, and other refined products, including diesel, jet, and biofuels.

item.description:

Apogee 21 Holdings signed a letter of intent to acquire Rod & Hammer, the largest craft distillery on California's Central Coast, including the brand and related assets. The transaction is expected to close in the fourth quarter of 2026, subject to definitive agreements, due diligence, and financing. This follows Apogee's acquisition of Noble Oak in March 2026, expanding its premium American whiskey portfolio.

About: Apogee 21 Holdings, Inc. doing business as A21 Wine & Spirits, produces and markets craft spirits and wine. The company owns Monkey in Paradise Vodka, Andale Tequila, and Blue Nectar Tequila brands. The company also has the sales agency for Zunte Mezcal, and Finca Ferrer Wines from Argentina. The company was formerly known as 30DC, Inc. and changed its name to Apogee 21 Holdings, Inc. in August 2022. Apogee 21 Holdings, Inc. was founded in 2005 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.

item.title: 🪙 Debt Restr. · GAUZ
item.scanner:headline: Proposes debt settlement under Israeli Insolvency Law; $7M PIPE led by CEO
item.description:
Proposes debt settlement under Israeli Insolvency Law; $7M PIPE led by CEO

Proposed a debt settlement under Sections 322–348 of the Israeli Insolvency Law to repay all creditors in full via two tracks: (a) upon an exit event exceeding $330M, or (b) 25% of annual net profit until repaid. In connection, the company entered a binding term sheet for a $7M PIPE led by CEO Eyal Peso and Chutzpah Holdings LP, conditioned on creditor approval and court confirmation. The settlement requires a double majority of creditors and court confirmation; no definitive agreement has been executed.

About: Gauzy Ltd., an integrated light and vision control company, develops, manufactures, and supplies vision and light control technologies in Israel, the United States, France, rest of Europe, Asia, and internationally. It operates through four segments: Architecture, Automotive, Safety tech, and Aeronautics.

  • Announced: 2026-07-20
  • Expected Close: within weeks
  • Next catalyst: Creditor vote and court confirmation

item.description:

The company operates in two segments, Women’s Health and Cardiovascular. The company provides SimpliDerm, a human acellular dermal matrix used in soft tissue reconstruction.

It also provides vintage-screen t-shirts and wovens under various private labels.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · BNS
item.scanner:headline: Acquires Maple Financial Holdings for stock consideration; Maple shareholder vote required
item.description:
Acquires Maple Financial Holdings for stock consideration; Maple shareholder vote required

The Bank of Nova Scotia (BNS) is acquiring Maple Financial Holdings, Inc. via a merger of its wholly owned subsidiary with Maple. Each Maple share will be converted into a number of BNS common shares based on a formula: $25 million plus Maple's adjusted tangible equity capital divided by the number of fully diluted Maple shares, then divided by the 10-day VWAP of BNS shares. The merger was announced on May 28, 2026, and requires approval by two-thirds of Maple voting common and preferred shareholders voting as separate classes. BNS is not soliciting proxies; this F-4 registers the BNS shares to be issued.

About: The Bank of Nova Scotia provides various banking products and services in Canada, the United States, Mexico, Peru, Chile, Colombia, the Caribbean and Central America, and internationally. It operates through Canadian Banking, International Banking, Global Wealth Management, and Global Banking and Markets segments.

  • Counterparty: Maple Financial Holdings, Inc.
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-05-28
  • Next catalyst: Maple shareholder vote

item.description:

GameStop Corp. filed a Schedule 13D/A disclosing beneficial ownership of 43,390,383 shares of eBay Inc., representing 9.8% of outstanding shares. The increase includes physical settlement of 39,046,658 shares underlying put/call pairs at an average strike of $101.30 per share, plus open-market purchases of 3.5 million shares. GameStop previously made an offer to eBay (per Exhibit 99.1), though no new activist demands are disclosed in this amendment.

About: eBay Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates marketplace platforms that connect buyers and sellers in the United States, the United Kingdom, China, Germany, and internationally. Its marketplace platform includes its online marketplace at ebay.com, off-platform businesses, and the eBay suite of mobile apps. The company’s platforms enable users to list, sell, buy, and pay various products. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in San Jose, California.

The board cites concerns about FBB's debt, potential negative equity, and substantial dilution to DXL stockholders—FBB stockholders would own 55% of the combined company. item.description:

To acquire NCS Multistage Holdings, Inc. (NCSM) in a stock/cash election merger. NCS stockholders may elect to receive 0.5537 WFRD shares per NCS share (Share Consideration) or a mixed consideration of cash equal to 0.1371 WFRD shares' value plus 0.2392 WFRD shares (Mixed Consideration), subject to proration. The implied value per NCS share was $57.39 (all share election) based on WFRD closing price of $103.64 on May 29, 2026. item.description:

Completed the sale of The Ritz-Carlton Sarasota, Hotel Yountville, and Bardessono Hotel and Spa for $437.5M in cash (net $432.7M after expenses). Proceeds were used to repay $232.8M of mortgage debt. Separately, the company entered into an agreement to sell Pier House Resort & Spa in Key West for $190M cash, with closing subject to customary conditions.

About: Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on the high-growth luxury hotel and resort sector. Its industry-leading portfolio features luxury properties across the United States and the U.S. territories in the Caribbean.

item.title: ⚖️ Litigation · Won · SNY
item.scanner:headline: FDA approves subcutaneous Sarclisa Escena for multiple myeloma
item.description:
FDA approves subcutaneous Sarclisa Escena for multiple myeloma

The FDA approved Sanofi's subcutaneous Sarclisa Escena (isatuximab-irfc) for multiple myeloma across all existing indications of the IV formulation. It is the first anticancer treatment administered via an on-body injector. Approval based on IRAKLIA phase 3 study demonstrating non-inferior efficacy and safety vs IV infusion.

About: Sanofi engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of therapeutic solutions. It provides immunology and inflammation, rare diseases neurology, oncology, and other vaccines. It also offers poliomyelitis, pertussis, and haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) pediatric vaccines; respiratory syncytial virus protection and hexavalent combination vaccines that includes hepatitis A, typhoid, yellow fever, and rabies vaccines.

  • Announced: 2026-07-10
  • Next catalyst: FDA approval granted

item.scanner:headline: Transfers operating sub to lenders; $12.5M debt extinguished; seeks reverse merger
item.description:
Transfers operating sub to lenders; $12.5M debt extinguished; seeks reverse merger

Transferred all equity of its operating subsidiary SpringBig, Inc. to secured lenders Lightbank II and LS Round II in satisfaction of approximately $12.5 million in principal and accrued interest. The company is now a shell and intends to pursue a strategic business combination; new CEO Andrew Glashow was appointed to lead the effort. If no transaction is consummated, the company will likely wind down and dissolve.

item.description:
Acquires Jetro Restaurant Depot for $21.6B cash + 91.5M shares; SYY holders get 1-for-1 exchange

Files amended S-4 for its acquisition of Jetro Restaurant Depot. Under the merger agreement, Sysco (SYY) stockholders will receive one share of the new holding company for each SYY share, and Jetro equityholders will receive $21.6B cash and 91.5M shares of the new holding company. Existing SYY stockholders will own ~84% of the combined company. The transaction does not require SYY stockholder approval and is expected to close by Q1 2027, subject to HSR clearance and other conditions.

item.description:
FDA approves REVTORPYK for HR+/HER2- breast cancer; launch late Q3 2026

FDA approved REVTORPYK (gedatolisib) for HR+/HER2-, PIK3CA wild-type locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer after prior endocrine therapy. Phase 3 VIKTORIA-1 trial showed 76% and 67% reduction in risk of progression or death with REVTORPYK combinations vs fulvestrant. Celcuity plans commercial launch in late Q3 2026 and will submit an sNDA for the PIK3CA mutant cohort in Q3 2026.

Faces an unsolicited tender offer from Diana Shipping at $24.80 per share cash. The board unanimously recommends against tendering, stating the offer undervalues the company and is below NAV. Diana has extended the offer but not updated its materials to align with a separate higher indicative proposal. Shareholders can withdraw tendered shares at any time.

About: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ocean transportation of drybulk cargoes worldwide. It operates through two segments: major bulk and minor bulk fleet. The company owns and operates dry bulk vessels to transports iron ore, grains, coal, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. It charters its vessels primarily to trading houses, including commodities traders; producers; and government-owned entities.

  • Counterparty: Diana Shipping Inc.

item.description:

Will be acquired by Equity Residential (EQR) in a stock-for-stock merger of equals. Each AVB share will convert into 2.793 EQR shares, implying a value of $190.79 per AVB share based on EQR's July 8 closing price. Former AVB stockholders will own ~51% of the combined company. Co. entered into a definitive merger agreement with USFM Corporation, under which USFM Merger Sub will merge into Twin Vee, with Twin Vee surviving as a wholly-owned subsidiary of USFM. Twin Vee shareholders will receive a pro rata portion of 10% of USFM's outstanding shares post-merger. Prior to closing, Twin Vee's existing assets and liabilities will be contributed to a trust and distributed as contingent value rights (CVRs) to current shareholders.
